column1: Ildemaro Vargas stands out as a top pick, riding a perfect hit rate in every game this season and benefiting from a strong platoon advantage at home against Germán Márquez. Kevin McGonigle also offers reliability, leading off with a favorable lefty-righty matchup and a recent uptick in hit rate. Cody Bellinger and Yandy Diaz provide additional steady options, but Vargas’s consistency and matchup make him the most dependable choice today.
